calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Hugo Torbet, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Collin Hardwick, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Rhoni Roop, a/k/a Ronnie Roop.
Default was entered against defendant on April 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Collin Hardwick, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rohani Roop, a/k/a Ronnie Roop as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,431.90.
Costs - $720.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $17,151.90.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
